query: My coffee machine won't turn on. I've checked the power outlet and it's working fine.
ground_truth: Technical Support - I understand your coffee machine won't turn on. Let me help you troubleshoot this. Can you tell me: What model do you have? Are there any lights or sounds when you press the power button? Have you tried a different outlet? Initial guidance: Try unplugging the machine for 30 seconds, then plug it back in. Check if the power cord is firmly connected at both ends.

query: When will my monthly subscription charge appear on my credit card?
ground_truth: Billing Question - Your monthly subscription is typically charged on the same date each month as your original sign-up date. Can you tell me when you first subscribed? Next steps: Check your account settings to see your next billing date, or I can help you access your billing history to confirm the pattern.

query: What's the difference between the Pro and Premium coffee machine models?
ground_truth: Product Inquiry - The Pro and Premium models have several key differences. The Premium offers a larger water reservoir, built-in grinder, and Wi-Fi connectivity for app control. The Pro has manual controls and a standard reservoir. What features are most important to you? Next steps: I can provide detailed specifications or help you determine which model best fits your needs.

query: I'm very disappointed with the customer service I received yesterday. The representative was rude.
ground_truth: Complaint or Feedback - I sincerely apologize for the poor experience you had with our customer service. This is not the level of service we strive to provide. Can you share more details about what happened? Do you remember the representative's name or the time of your interaction? Next steps: I'll escalate this to our customer service manager for immediate review and follow-up with you within 24 hours.

query: What are your business hours?
ground_truth: General Question - Our customer support is available Monday through Friday, 8 AM to 8 PM EST, and Saturday 9 AM to 5 PM EST. We're closed on Sundays. Are you looking to speak with someone specific, or is there something I can help you with right now?

query: My coffee machine displays 'Error Code E47'. What does this mean?
ground_truth: Technical Support - Error Code E47 indicates a water flow issue. This usually means the water pump is having difficulty or there's a blockage. Which model do you have? When did this error first appear? Initial guidance: First, check that the water reservoir is properly seated and filled. Remove and clean the water reservoir, then reseat it firmly. If the error persists, the water filter may need replacement or the pump may need servicing.

query: I was charged twice for the same order. Can you help me get a refund?
ground_truth: Billing Question - I apologize for the duplicate charge. I'll help you resolve this immediately. Can you provide: Your order number? The date of the charges? The amount charged? Next steps: I'll verify the duplicate charge in our system and initiate a refund for the incorrect charge. Refunds typically process within 3-5 business days.

query: Does the Contoso Deluxe model support both ground coffee and pods?
ground_truth: Product Inquiry - Yes, the Contoso Deluxe is a versatile dual-brew system that supports both ground coffee and compatible pods. It includes separate brew chambers for each type. Are you considering purchasing this model, or do you already own it and need guidance on using both options? Next steps: I can provide information on compatible pod types or instructions for switching between brewing methods.

query: I love the new subscription service! It's so convenient.
ground_truth: Complaint or Feedback - Thank you so much for the positive feedback! We're thrilled to hear the subscription service is working well for you. Is there anything specific about it that you find most helpful? Your feedback helps us continue improving. Next steps: If you'd like to refer friends, we offer a referral program with rewards for both you and your referrals.

query: How do I update my account email address?
ground_truth: General Question - To update your email address: Log into your account at contoso.com, go to Account Settings, select Profile, click Edit next to your email, enter your new email, and click Save. You'll receive a verification email at the new address. Do you have access to your current account, or are you having trouble logging in? Next steps: I can walk you through the process or send you a direct link to the account settings page.

query: The Wi-Fi connectivity keeps dropping on my smart coffee maker.
ground_truth: Technical Support - I understand your smart coffee maker is having Wi-Fi connectivity issues. Let me help you troubleshoot. Can you tell me: How often does it disconnect? Is your router close to the machine? Are other devices on the same network working properly? Initial guidance: Try restarting your coffee maker and router. Ensure your router's 2.4GHz band is enabled (the machine doesn't support 5GHz). Check for firmware updates in the Contoso app.

query: Can I upgrade my subscription from Basic to Premium mid-cycle?
ground_truth: Billing Question - Yes, you can upgrade from Basic to Premium at any time during your billing cycle. When you upgrade, you'll be charged a prorated amount for the Premium features for the remainder of your current cycle. Would you like to proceed with the upgrade now? Next steps: I can calculate the prorated cost and process the upgrade immediately, or you can upgrade through your account settings at contoso.com/account/subscription.

query: What's the warranty period for Contoso coffee machines?
ground_truth: Product Inquiry - All Contoso coffee machines come with a standard 2-year manufacturer's warranty covering defects in materials and workmanship. Premium and Deluxe models include an extended 3-year warranty. Which model do you have or are interested in? The warranty covers repairs and replacements but excludes normal wear and tear. Next steps: I can provide detailed warranty terms or help you register your product for warranty coverage.

query: The delivery was 3 days late and no one informed me.
ground_truth: Complaint or Feedback - I sincerely apologize for the delayed delivery and lack of communication. This is not acceptable, and I understand your frustration. Can you provide your order number so I can investigate what happened? Next steps: I'll track down the cause of the delay, ensure you receive your order as soon as possible, and apply a discount or credit to your account as an apology for the inconvenience.

query: Do you ship internationally?
ground_truth: General Question - Yes, we ship to select international locations. We currently deliver to Canada, Mexico, UK, EU countries, and Australia. Shipping times and costs vary by destination. Which country are you located in? Next steps: I can provide specific shipping costs and estimated delivery times for your location, or direct you to our international shipping page for complete details.

query: How do I descale my coffee machine?
ground_truth: Product Inquiry - Descaling is important for maintaining your machine's performance. The process varies by model. Which Contoso model do you have? General steps: Use Contoso descaling solution or white vinegar, run a descaling cycle (usually accessed through settings), then run 2-3 rinse cycles with fresh water. Next steps: I can provide specific instructions for your model, or send you a link to our descaling video tutorial. We recommend descaling every 3 months with regular use.

query: I noticed a strange charge on my bill labeled 'Contoso Premium Plus'.
ground_truth: Billing Question - Let me help you understand this charge. Contoso Premium Plus is an optional service tier that includes premium coffee delivery and extended warranty coverage. Can you tell me: When did this charge appear? Do you recall signing up for any additional services recently? Next steps: I'll review your account to verify if this is an authorized charge or a billing error, and we'll resolve it immediately if it was added in error.

query: My machine is leaking water from the bottom.
ground_truth: Technical Support - A water leak needs immediate attention. Let me help you troubleshoot. Can you tell me: Which model do you have? Is the leak constant or only when brewing? Is the water reservoir properly seated? Initial guidance: Turn off and unplug the machine immediately. Check that the drip tray and water reservoir are properly positioned. Inspect for any visible cracks. Next steps: If the leak persists, this may require service or replacement under warranty. I can arrange a service appointment or replacement.

query: I'd like to suggest adding a mobile app for controlling the machine.
ground_truth: Complaint or Feedback - Thank you for this suggestion! Actually, great news - we do have a Contoso Connect mobile app for our Premium and Deluxe models with Wi-Fi capability. Which model do you have? If your model isn't compatible, I'll forward your feedback to our product development team as we're always looking to expand app functionality. Next steps: I can help you download and set up the app if you have a compatible model, or provide information about models that support app control.

query: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
ground_truth: General Question - Yes, you can cancel your Contoso subscription at any time with no cancellation fees. Your service will continue until the end of your current billing period, and you won't be charged again. Are you considering canceling, or just checking the policy? Next steps: If you'd like to cancel, I can process that immediately through your account settings, or help you explore if a different subscription tier might better meet your needs.
